props.text: Comprehensive code review log documenting production code analysis, architectural decisions, refactoring initiatives, and quality improvements.

links.title: Component System Review
links.description: Refer to the implementation notes for this subsection.

links.title: Security Architecture Review
links.description: Refer to the implementation notes for this subsection.

links.title: Performance Review
links.description: Refer to the implementation notes for this subsection.

props.body:
Atomic design pattern for component organization
• Repository pattern for data access layer
• Server Components for data fetching and security
• Client Components only for interactivity
• Dynamic routes with generateStaticParams for SEO
• Polymorphic URL policy for content systems
• Guard architecture to prevent hydration mismatches

Migration to TypeScript strict mode (Q1 2026)
• Component library extraction and Storybook setup
• Documentation dynamic route system implementation
• Content library architecture standardization
• URL policy polymorphism for multi-system support
• Integration test coverage expansion

TypeScript strict mode: 100% enabled
• Test coverage: 94% overall, 100% for critical paths
• Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
• Security: 7-layer defense, no known vulnerabilities
• Performance: All Core Web Vitals targets met
• Bundle size: Optimized with code splitting
